return(function(x,n,w,I,D,Y,e,q,F,s,j,y,G,V,E,A,C,Z,K,L,M,r,l)q,y,A,M,Z,E,K,C,j,r,G,V,s,l,F,L={},function(x,i)local n=K(i)local w=function(w,I,D,Y,e,q,E)return M(x,{w;I;D;Y;e;q;E},i,n)end return w end,function(x,i)local n=K(i)local w=function(w)return M(x,{w},i,n)end return w end,function(M,w,I,D)local
